title: sterculia africana var. rivae
intro: Sterculia africana var. rivae, also known as the African sterculia or the Rivae sterculia, is a plant species within the sterculia family, characterized by its distinctive flowers and fruit. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sterculia africana var. rivae include the potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and support digestive health, while also exhibiting immunomodulatory and anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, where the roots and bark are typically used to make various herbal preparations.
